targets.query:
from(bucket: "f1")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "session_info" and r._field == "total_laps")
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 1)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      _time: r._time,
      _value:
        if r.track == "Melbourne" then "🇦🇺 Melbourne, Australia · R1"
        else if r.track == "Shanghai" then "🇨🇳 Shanghai, China · R2"
        else if r.track == "Suzuka" then "🇯🇵 Suzuka, Japan · R3"
        else if r.track == "Sakhir" then "🇧🇭 Sakhir, Bahrain · R4"
        else if r.track == "Jeddah" then "🇸🇦 Jeddah, Saudi Arabia · R5"
        else if r.track == "Miami" then "🇺🇸 Miami, USA · R6"
        else if r.track == "Imola" then "🇮🇹 Imola, Italy · R7"
        else if r.track == "Monte Carlo" then "🇲🇨 Monaco · R8"
        else if r.track == "Monaco" then "🇲🇨 Monaco · R8"
        else if r.track == "Barcelona" then "🇪🇸 Barcelona, Spain · R9"
        else if r.track == "Catalunya" then "🇪🇸 Catalunya, Spain · R9"
        else if r.track == "Montreal" then "🇨🇦 Montreal, Canada · R10"
        else if r.track == "Spielberg" then "🇦🇹 Spielberg, Austria · R11"
        else if r.track == "Silverstone" then "🇬🇧 Silverstone, UK · R12"
        else if r.track == "Spa-Francorchamps" then "🇧🇪 Spa, Belgium · R13"
        else if r.track == "Budapest" then "🇭🇺 Budapest, Hungary · R14"
        else if r.track == "Zandvoort" then "🇳🇱 Zandvoort, Netherlands · R15"
        else if r.track == "Monza" then "🇮🇹 Monza, Italy · R16"
        else if r.track == "Baku" then "🇦🇿 Baku, Azerbaijan · R17"
        else if r.track == "Singapore" then "🇸🇬 Singapore · R18"
        else if r.track == "Austin" then "🇺🇸 Austin, USA · R19"
        else if r.track == "Mexico City" then "🇲🇽 Mexico City, Mexico · R20"
        else if r.track == "São Paulo" then "🇧🇷 São Paulo, Brazil · R21"
        else if r.track == "Sao Paulo" then "🇧🇷 São Paulo, Brazil · R21"
        else if r.track == "Las Vegas" then "🇺🇸 Las Vegas, USA · R22"
        else if r.track == "Lusail" then "🇶🇦 Lusail, Qatar · R23"
        else if r.track == "Yas Marina" then "🇦🇪 Yas Marina, UAE · R24"
        else r.track
    }))
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])

from(bucket: "f1")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "session_info" and r._field == "driver_code")
  |> group()

from(bucket: "f1")

from(bucket: "f1")

from(bucket: "f1")

from(bucket: "f1")

from(bucket: "f1")

panels.title: Ghost Δ (AI vs Actual)
panels.description: Positive (green) = AI strategy would be faster. Negative (red) = actual faster.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "f1")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "ghost_delta" and r._field == "cumulative_delta")
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 1)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])

from(bucket: "f1")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "driver_state" and r._field == "compound")
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 1)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])

from(bucket: "f1")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "driver_state" and r._field == "tire_age")
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 1)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])

panels.title: Ghost Car Delta — Cumulative Time Saved by AI
panels.description: How much time the AI's strategy would have saved (green) or cost (red) compared to what actually happened.

targets.query:
cumulative = from(bucket: "f1")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "ghost_delta" and r._field == "cumulative_delta")
  |> group()
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "driver"])
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "cumulative_delta"})
laps = from(bucket: "f1")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "ghost_delta" and r._field == "lap")
  |> group()
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "driver"])
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "lap"})
join(tables: {c: cumulative, l: laps}, on: ["_time", "driver"])
  |> group(columns: ["lap"])
  |> last(column: "cumulative_delta")
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["lap"])
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ lap: r.lap, cumulative_delta: r.cumulative_delta }))

panels.title: 📻 AI Race Engineer — Radio Briefings
panels.description: Messages from the AI strategist over the race.

targets.query:
latest = from(bucket: "f1")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "briefing" and r._field == "text")
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 1)
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)
runStartRec = from(bucket: "f1")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "briefing" and r._field == "lap" and r._value == 1.0 and r.driver == latest.driver and r.track == latest.track)
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 1)
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)
from(bucket: "f1")
  |> range(start: runStartRec._time)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "briefing" and r.driver == latest.driver and r.track == latest.track)
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> sort(columns: ["lap"], desc: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ _time: r._time, _value: "━━━━━  LAP " + string(v: int(v: r.lap)) + "  ━━━━━   " + r.text }))

panels.title: Position Battle - You vs Rivals (by Lap)
panels.description: Track position over the race. Lower = better.

targets.query:
latest = from(bucket: "f1")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "briefing" and r._field == "text")
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 1)
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)
runStartRec = from(bucket: "f1")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "briefing" and r._field == "lap" and r._value == 1.0 and r.driver == latest.driver and r.track == latest.track)
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 1)
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)
user = from(bucket: "f1")
  |> range(start: runStartRec._time)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "position" and r.driver == latest.driver and r.track == latest.track)
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> group(columns: ["lap"])
  |> last(column: "position")
  |> group()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ lap: r.lap, driver: latest.driver, position: r.position }))
rivals = from(bucket: "f1")
  |> range(start: runStartRec._time)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "rival_position" and r.driver == latest.driver and r.track == latest.track)
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time", "opponent"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> group(columns: ["opponent", "lap"])
  |> last(column: "position")
  |> group()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ lap: r.lap, driver: r.opponent, position: r.position }))
union(tables: [user, rivals])
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["lap"], columnKey: ["driver"], valueColumn: "position")
  |> sort(columns: ["lap"])

panels.title: Nearest Rivals
panels.description: Drivers immediately around us, their compound, tire age, gap, and predicted pit lap.

targets.query:
latest = from(bucket: "f1")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "briefing" and r._field == "text")
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 1)
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)
from(bucket: "f1")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "spy_intel" and r.driver == latest.driver and r.track == latest.track)
  |> last()
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["opponent"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> group()
  |> keep(columns: ["opponent","position","lap","compound","gap_seconds","tire_age","pit_probability","predicted_pit_lap"])
  |> sort(columns: ["position"])

sessionStart = from(bucket: "f1")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "session_info" and r._field == "driver_code")
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 1)
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

from(bucket: "f1")
  |> range(start: sessionStart._time)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "tire_allocation" and r._field == "sets")
  |> last()
  |> keep(columns: ["_value", "compound"])
  |> pivot(rowKey: [], columnKey: ["compound"], valueColumn: "_value")

panels.title: Strategy Comparison — AI Plan vs Actual (by Stint)
panels.description: Side-by-side stint comparison. Red=SOFT, Yellow=MEDIUM, White=HARD, Green=INTER, Blue=WET.

targets.query:
latest = from(bucket: "f1")
  |> range(start: -7d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "briefing" and r._field == "text")
  |> group() |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true) |> limit(n: 1)
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)
runStartRec = from(bucket: "f1")
  |> range(start: -7d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "briefing" and r._field == "lap" and r._value == 1.0 and r.driver == latest.driver and r.track == latest.track)
  |> group() |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true) |> limit(n: 1)
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

ranked = from(bucket: "f1")
  |> range(start: runStartRec._time)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "stint_timeline" and r.driver == latest.driver and r.track == latest.track)
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time","source","stint_index"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> group(columns: ["source","stint_index"])
  |> last(column: "compound")
  |> group(columns: ["source"])
  |> sort(columns: ["lap_start"])
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _seed: 1}))
  |> cumulativeSum(columns: ["_seed"])

compounds = ranked
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
        strategy: if r.source == "ai" then "AI Plan" else "Actual",
        col: "S" + string(v: r._seed),
        val:
          if r.compound == "INTERMEDIATE" then "INTER"
          else if r.compound == "MEDIUM" then "MED"
          else r.compound,
        sort_key: r._seed * 2 - 1
     }))

laps = ranked
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
        strategy: if r.source == "ai" then "AI Plan" else "Actual",
        col: "S" + string(v: r._seed) + " Laps",
        val: "L" + string(v: r.lap_start) + "-" + string(v: r.lap_end),
        sort_key: r._seed * 2
     }))

union(tables: [compounds, laps])
  |> group()
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["strategy"], columnKey: ["col"], valueColumn: "val")

latest = from(bucket: "f1")
  |> range(start: -7d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "briefing" and r._field == "text")
  |> group() |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true) |> limit(n: 1)
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)
runStartRec = from(bucket: "f1")
  |> range(start: -7d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "briefing" and r._field == "lap" and r._value == 1.0 and r.driver == latest.driver and r.track == latest.track)
  |> group() |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true) |> limit(n: 1)
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

from(bucket: "f1")
  |> range(start: runStartRec._time)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "race_result" and r._field == "finish_position" and r.driver == latest.driver and r.track == latest.track)
  |> group() |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true) |> limit(n: 1)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])

latest = from(bucket: "f1")
  |> range(start: -7d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "briefing" and r._field == "text")
  |> group() |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true) |> limit(n: 1)
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)
runStartRec = from(bucket: "f1")
  |> range(start: -7d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "briefing" and r._field == "lap" and r._value == 1.0 and r.driver == latest.driver and r.track == latest.track)
  |> group() |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true) |> limit(n: 1)
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

from(bucket: "f1")
  |> range(start: runStartRec._time)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "race_result" and r._field == "estimated_ai_finish" and r.driver == latest.driver and r.track == latest.track)
  |> group() |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true) |> limit(n: 1)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])

latest = from(bucket: "f1")
  |> range(start: -7d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "briefing" and r._field == "text")
  |> group() |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true) |> limit(n: 1)
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)
runStartRec = from(bucket: "f1")
  |> range(start: -7d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "briefing" and r._field == "lap" and r._value == 1.0 and r.driver == latest.driver and r.track == latest.track)
  |> group() |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true) |> limit(n: 1)
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

actualRec = from(bucket: "f1")
  |> range(start: runStartRec._time)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "race_result" and r._field == "finish_position" and r.driver == latest.driver and r.track == latest.track)
  |> group() |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true) |> limit(n: 1)
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)
aiRec = from(bucket: "f1")
  |> range(start: runStartRec._time)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "race_result" and r._field == "estimated_ai_finish" and r.driver == latest.driver and r.track == latest.track)
  |> group() |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true) |> limit(n: 1)
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

from(bucket: "f1")
  |> range(start: runStartRec._time)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "race_result" and r._field == "finish_position" and r.driver == latest.driver and r.track == latest.track)
  |> group() |> last()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: int(v: actualRec._value) - int(v: aiRec._value) }))
  |> keep(columns: ["_time","_value"])

latest = from(bucket: "f1")
  |> range(start: -7d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "briefing" and r._field == "text")
  |> group() |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true) |> limit(n: 1)
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)
runStartRec = from(bucket: "f1")
  |> range(start: -7d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "briefing" and r._field == "lap" and r._value == 1.0 and r.driver == latest.driver and r.track == latest.track)
  |> group() |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true) |> limit(n: 1)
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

from(bucket: "f1")
  |> range(start: runStartRec._time)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "race_result" and r._field == "final_delta_seconds" and r.driver == latest.driver and r.track == latest.track)
  |> group() |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true) |> limit(n: 1)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])

panels.title: AI Race Engineer — Full Race Debrief
panels.description: A full narrative breakdown of the race from the AI strategist.

defaults.noValue: Race debrief will appear here when the race finishes.

targets.query:
import "strings"

latest = from(bucket: "f1")
  |> range(start: -7d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "briefing" and r._field == "text")
  |> group() |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true) |> limit(n: 1)
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)
runStartRec = from(bucket: "f1")
  |> range(start: -7d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "briefing" and r._field == "lap" and r._value == 1.0 and r.driver == latest.driver and r.track == latest.track)
  |> group() |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true) |> limit(n: 1)
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

from(bucket: "f1")
  |> range(start: runStartRec._time)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "debrief" and r._field == "text" and r.driver == latest.driver and r.track == latest.track)
  |> group() |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true) |> limit(n: 1)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value:
      strings.replaceAll(v:
        strings.replaceAll(v:
          strings.replaceAll(v: r._value, t: "**", u: ""),
          t: "  ", u: " "),
        t: "\n\n\n", u: "\n\n")
  }))
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])

panels.title: Lap Times — AI vs Actual (by Lap)

targets.query:
latest = from(bucket: "f1")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "briefing" and r._field == "text")
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 1)
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)
runStartRec = from(bucket: "f1")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "briefing" and r._field == "lap" and r._value == 1.0 and r.driver == latest.driver and r.track == latest.track)
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 1)
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)
from(bucket: "f1")
  |> range(start: runStartRec._time)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "lap_time" and r.driver == latest.driver and r.track == latest.track)
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time","source"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> group(columns: ["source","lap"])
  |> last(column: "duration")
  |> group()
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["lap"], columnKey: ["source"], valueColumn: "duration")
  |> sort(columns: ["lap"])
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ lap: r.lap, ai: r.ai, actual: r.actual }))
